  "description": "At NEM Insurance Plc.,our mission is &quot;to build a customer-satisfying insurance institution passionate about adding value to the interests of all stakeholders.&quot; With career growth opportunities, highly competitive pay and benefits, and a strong work culture, we recognize the power of &quot;Together to Succeed&quot; for our people. That is why we are looking for young, passionate, results-driven graduates ready to kickstart their careers with us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Knowledge and experience in preparing full annual and periodic financial statements.
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant experience.
	Experience and understanding of the tenets of IFRS 17 reporting and requirements.
	Experience in relating with external auditors, actuaries, and other external consultants.
	Experience with regulatory reporting, e.g., NAICOM, SEC, NGX, etc.
	Professional qualification (ICAN, ACCA, or equivalent) is required.


Salary
N1,000,000 - 1,300,000 annually.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should apply by submitting their CV and a cover letter to:&nbsp;hr@nem-insurance.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Accountant Job at NEM Insurance Plc




        
    

        
        At NEM Insurance Plc.,our mission is "to build a customer-satisfying insurance institution passionate about adding value to the interests of all stakeholders." With career growth opportunities, highly competitive pay and benefits, and a strong work culture, we recognize the power of "Together to Succeed" for our people. That is why we are looking for young, passionate, results-driven graduates ready to kickstart their careers with us.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Knowledge and experience in preparing full annual and periodic financial statements.
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant experience.
	Experience and understanding of the tenets of IFRS 17 reporting and requirements.
	Experience in relating with external auditors, actuaries, and other external consultants.
	Experience with regulatory reporting, e.g., NAICOM, SEC, NGX, etc.
	Professional qualification (ICAN, ACCA, or equivalent) is required.


Salary
N1,000,000 - 1,300,000 annually.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should apply by submitting their CV and a cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Chief Human Resource & Administration Officer (CHRAO)",
  "description": "Digital Ehealth Solutions Limited is an ICT service company with experience in enhancing health management systems and healthcare-focused services through digital information, to improve healthcare outcomes amongst other value added services.

Our approach emphasizes client satisfaction and high-quality service delivery, supported by a team of forward-thinking professionals who design, develop, and deploy tailored ICT infrastructure for efficient healthcare delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Human Resource &amp; Administration Officer (CHRAO)

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-Time

Position Overview


	The CHRAO is a senior executive responsible for developing and implementing the organization&rsquo;s human capital strategy, administrative governance, and workforce systems.
	The role ensures the organization maintains a productive, compliant, and high-performance workforce while driving operational efficiency and strong organizational culture.
	The CHRAO reports directly to the CEO and is a key member of the executive leadership team.


Key Responsibilities


	Human Resource Strategy.
	Talent Acquisition &amp; Development
	Performance &amp; Workforce Management
	Employee Relations &amp; Culture
	HR Governance &amp; Compliance
	Administration &amp; Corporate Services
	Organizational Development.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum 5&ndash;10 years of HR and administration experience
	At least 5 years in a senior HR leadership role
	MBA or Master&rsquo;s degree will be an advantage.
	Professional certification (CIPM, SHRM, CIPD or equivalent)
	Experience managing large or multi-location workforce preferred.


Key Competencies:


	Strategic HR leadership
	Workforce planning &amp; talent management
	Organizational development
	HR compliance &amp; governance
	Administrative systems management
	Strong interpersonal and negotiation skills
	High integrity and leadership presence.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their updated CV, cover letter, and copies of relevant certifications to:&nbsp;contact@ahcsl.org&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Chief Human Resource & Administration Officer (CHRAO) Job at Digital Ehealth Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Digital Ehealth Solutions Limited is an ICT service company with experience in enhancing health management systems and healthcare-focused services through digital information, to improve healthcare outcomes amongst other value added services.

Our approach emphasizes client satisfaction and high-quality service delivery, supported by a team of forward-thinking professionals who design, develop, and deploy tailored ICT infrastructure for efficient healthcare delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Human Resource & Administration Officer (CHRAO)

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-Time

Position Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The CHRAO is a senior executive responsible for developing and implementing the organization’s human capital strategy, administrative governance, and workforce systems.
	The role ensures the organization maintains a productive, compliant, and high-performance workforce while driving operational efficiency and strong organizational culture.
	The CHRAO reports directly to the CEO and is a key member of the executive leadership team.


Key Responsibilities


	Human Resource Strategy.
	Talent Acquisition & Development
	Performance & Workforce Management
	Employee Relations & Culture
	HR Governance & Compliance
	Administration & Corporate Services
	Organizational Development.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum 5–10 years of HR and administration experience
	At least 5 years in a senior HR leadership role
	MBA or Master’s degree will be an advantage.
	Professional certification (CIPM, SHRM, CIPD or equivalent)
	Experience managing large or multi-location workforce preferred.


Key Competencies:


	Strategic HR leadership
	Workforce planning & talent management
	Organizational development
	HR compliance & governance
	Administrative systems management
	Strong interpersonal and negotiation skills
	High integrity and leadership presence.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV, cover letter, and copies of relevant certifications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
